channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.1 2019-11-03T18:41:40Z Features/Updates: Same as 3.0.0 release Fix for invalid make file patch Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates: drush cache:rebuild drush updatedb 3.0.0 2019-11-03T18:03:09Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.
